name: add_sveltekit_routing
avoid: do not use +page.server.ts for client-only data
brief_template:
To add a route in SvelteKit:
1. Create src/routes/<path>/+page.svelte for the UI
2. Add src/routes/<path>/+page.ts for client load
3. Add src/routes/<path>/+page.server.ts for server load/actions
4. Use +layout.svelte for shared wrappers
5. Define types in app.d.ts if needed
6. Handle errors with +error.svelte
